# ViraStack

> ViraStack web: open-source frontend tooling showcase, product docs (Nextra MDX), and marketing pages. Next.js App Router, next-intl (en/tr), Nextra 4.

Full machine-oriented map and repo conventions: [llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt)

## Site (default locale: English)

- [Home](https://virastack.com/en/): project hub and entry
- [About](https://virastack.com/en/about/): project / org context
- [Roadmap](https://virastack.com/en/roadmap/): planned work
- [Maintainers](https://virastack.com/en/maintainers/): people
- [Community](https://virastack.com/en/community/): community links
- [Standards](https://virastack.com/en/standards/): standards initiative (coming soon)
- [CLI](https://virastack.com/en/cli/): Start CLI (research)
- [Dashboard demo](https://virastack.com/en/dashboard/): UI demo page

## Product pages & docs (locale-prefixed)

- [Next.js Boilerplate](https://virastack.com/en/nextjs-boilerplate/)
- [AI Rules](https://virastack.com/en/ai/)
- [Input Mask — docs](https://virastack.com/en/mask/getting-started/)
- [Password Toggle — docs](https://virastack.com/en/password/getting-started/)
- [Modern Web in 3 Minutes](https://virastack.com/en/modern-web-in-3-minutes/)
- [TanStack Boilerplate](https://virastack.com/en/tanstack-boilerplate/)
- [Error Guard](https://virastack.com/en/error-guard/)

## Turkish locale

- [Ana sayfa (tr)](https://virastack.com/tr/)

## Source & packages

- Organization: [github.com/virastack](https://github.com/virastack)
- This site’s stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, next-intl, Nextra, TanStack Query, Zod, React Hook Form.
